description:
An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, powered by OpenCode

OpenWork is an extensible, open-source “Claude Work” style system for knowledge workers.
It’s a native desktop app that runs OpenCode under the hood, but presents it as a clean, guided workflow:
- pick a workspace
- start a run
- watch progress + plan updates
- approve permissions when needed
- reuse what works (templates + skills)
The goal: make “agentic work” feel like a product, not a terminal.
Highlights
- Route the landing CTA straight to the desktop downloads page so new users land on the right install surface faster.
- Fall back to published OpenWork Orchestrator release binaries during npm install so local installs recover more reliably.
Fixes & polish
- Build the Daytona snapshot image from the source orchestrator during release so snapshot outputs stay aligned with the shipped app.
Packaging / ops
- Version bump to 0.11.177 across the desktop app, server, orchestrator, and router packages.
Compare:
https://github.com/different-ai/openwork/compare/v0.11.176...v0.11.177
